name: Applesauce Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the shortening and sugar; add egg and beat well.
2. Add applesauce.
3. Sift dry ingredients together; add to the mixture.
4. Add nuts.
5. Place in a greased 8-inch pan and bake at 350°F for 50 to 60 minutes.
6. Good with powdered sugar frosting.
